news.title:
Netweb Technologies reappoints Sanjay, Vivek, Niraj, and Navin Lodha as directors for 5 years from Aug 2026.
Appointments approved via postal ballot and comply with SEBI regulations; detailed disclosure provided.
news.summary:
Netweb Technologies reappoints Sanjay, Vivek, Niraj, and Navin Lodha as directors for 5 years from Aug 2026.
Appointments approved via postal ballot and comply with SEBI regulations; detailed disclosure provided.

news.title: Netweb Technologies India Ltd announces Analyst/Investor Meet under Regulation 30 (LODR).
news.summary: Netweb Technologies India Ltd announces Analyst/Investor Meet under Regulation 30 (LODR).

news.title: HRTI Private Limited sold 3,04,731 shares of Netweb Tech India Ltd at an average price of ₹3338.9.
news.summary: HRTI Private Limited sold 3,04,731 shares of Netweb Tech India Ltd at an average price of ₹3338.9.

news.title:
Netweb Technologies shares rose 3% to Rs 3,807 on BSE after announcing a collaboration with Vertiv.
The partnership aims to develop and validate GPU-based AI infrastructure solutions jointly.
news.summary:
Netweb Technologies shares rose 3% to Rs 3,807 on BSE after announcing a collaboration with Vertiv.
The partnership aims to develop and validate GPU-based AI infrastructure solutions jointly.

news.title:
Netweb Tech collaborates with Vertiv to enhance AI data center infrastructure in India.
Vertiv to provide innovative rack solutions to meet advanced tech demands.
news.summary:
Netweb Tech collaborates with Vertiv to enhance AI data center infrastructure in India.
Vertiv to provide innovative rack solutions to meet advanced tech demands.

news.title:
Netweb Tech saw an NSE block trade of 60,144 shares, priced at Rs. 3614 each.
The transaction totaled Rs. 21.74 Cr, reflecting significant market activity.
news.summary:
Netweb Tech saw an NSE block trade of 60,144 shares, priced at Rs. 3614 each.
The transaction totaled Rs. 21.74 Cr, reflecting significant market activity.

news.title:
Netweb Tech launches AI supercomputing systems under 'Make In India' initiative.
The systems are developed using advanced NVIDIA technology.
news.summary:
Netweb Tech launches AI supercomputing systems under 'Make In India' initiative.
The systems are developed using advanced NVIDIA technology.

news.title:
Promoters of Netweb Technologies sold 20.8 lakh shares (3.65%) on February 12, 2026.
Post-sale, promoters' holding reduced to 66.98% from 70.64%; sale executed via open market.
news.summary:
Promoters of Netweb Technologies sold 20.8 lakh shares (3.65%) on February 12, 2026.
Post-sale, promoters' holding reduced to 66.98% from 70.64%; sale executed via open market.

news.title:
Netweb Technologies saw a large trade of 22.32 lakh shares.
The block deal valued at ₹682.3 crore involved 3.93% equity.
news.summary:
Netweb Technologies saw a large trade of 22.32 lakh shares.
The block deal valued at ₹682.3 crore involved 3.93% equity.

news.title:
Netweb Tech promoters to sell 3% stake via block deals worth ₹514.5 crore at ₹3,027/share, a 4% discount.
Q3 revenue rose 140% YoY to ₹804 crore; AI systems contributed 64.2% of topline.
news.summary:
Netweb Tech promoters to sell 3% stake via block deals worth ₹514.5 crore at ₹3,027/share, a 4% discount.
Q3 revenue rose 140% YoY to ₹804 crore; AI systems contributed 64.2% of topline.

news.title:
Netweb Technologies, listed on NSE and BSE, focuses on AI-led high-end computing, supercomputing, and private cloud solutions.
AI systems now contribute 48% of Netweb's revenue, driven by strategic orders and strong demand across sectors like research, IT, and defence.
news.summary:
Netweb Technologies, listed on NSE and BSE, focuses on AI-led high-end computing, supercomputing, and private cloud solutions.
AI systems now contribute 48% of Netweb's revenue, driven by strategic orders and strong demand across sectors like research, IT, and defence.

news.title:
Netweb Technologies will meet analysts and investors on 9 Feb 2026.
The meeting at Grand Hyatt Mumbai is part of Nuvama India Investor Conference.
news.summary:
Netweb Technologies will meet analysts and investors on 9 Feb 2026.
The meeting at Grand Hyatt Mumbai is part of Nuvama India Investor Conference.

news.title:
Netweb Technologies has uploaded Q3 FY2025-26 earnings call audio on its website.
The call was held on January 19, 2026, as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Netweb Technologies has uploaded Q3 FY2025-26 earnings call audio on its website.

news.title:
Netweb Tech's Q3 net profit rose to 733M rupees from 297M YoY.
Revenue surged to 8B rupees in Q3, up from 3.3B rupees YoY.
news.summary:
Netweb Tech's Q3 net profit rose to 733M rupees from 297M YoY.
Revenue surged to 8B rupees in Q3, up from 3.3B rupees YoY.

news.title:
Netweb Technologies' Board meeting on 17th Jan 2026 to review Q3 FY25 results.
Trading window closed from 1st Jan 2026 till 48 hours post-meeting conclusion.
news.summary:
Netweb Technologies' Board meeting on 17th Jan 2026 to review Q3 FY25 results.

news.title:
Force Motors led a stellar recovery, surging 200% to ₹18,353/share from 1-year lows; Netweb Technologies rebounded 155%.
Key gainers include Hindustan Copper (+137%), MCX (+145%), and Paytm (+103%). Metals and banking stocks also saw strong comebacks.
news.summary:
Force Motors led a stellar recovery, surging 200% to ₹18,353/share from 1-year lows; Netweb Technologies rebounded 155%.
Key gainers include Hindustan Copper (+137%), MCX (+145%), and Paytm (+103%). Metals and banking stocks also saw strong comebacks.

news.title:
Netweb Technologies announces an analyst/investor meeting with C Worldwide Asset Management on 28.11.2025 at 10:30 AM.
The meeting will be based on public data; no price-sensitive info will be shared.
news.summary:
Netweb Technologies announces an analyst/investor meeting with C Worldwide Asset Management on 28.11.2025 at 10:30 AM.

news.title:
Netweb Technologies surged 6% post Nvidia's strong Q4 results, highlighting their strategic OEM partnership.
Netweb's AI segment grew 160% YoY; shares traded 5% higher at ₹3,435 with volumes surpassing 20-day average.
news.summary:
Netweb Technologies surged 6% post Nvidia's strong Q4 results, highlighting their strategic OEM partnership.
Netweb's AI segment grew 160% YoY; shares traded 5% higher at ₹3,435 with volumes surpassing 20-day average.
